german_requirement.title: Majority of Roles Do Not Require German Skills
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant gap exists, with over half of positions accessible without German proficiency.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Lead, But Technical Roles Trail Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between Core and Technical PM roles, indicating potential constraints in talent accessibility.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate the Market
seniority.subtitle: With 57% of positions held by senior professionals, the market is clearly senior-heavy.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Despite Remote Options
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of employees still prefer on-site work over hybrid and remote arrangements.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with remote options remaining limited.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: A significant portion of roles now prioritize AI responsibilities and skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Are Equally Distributed Yet Unclassified
industry.subtitle: A significant portion of roles remains unclassified, indicating potential accessibility constraints.
